reviews.comment:
El peor servicio que brinda el ACA .NUNCA HAY SISTEMA, NO HAY BENEFICIOS SOCIO, OSEA TE COBRAN AL CONTADO, NUNCA TIENEN SISTEMA ...LOS INGRESOS SON PURO LODO...Y CUANDO CARGO COMBUSTIBLE POR LA MISMA SUMA EN OTRA IPF EL TANQUE SE LLENA ...OSEA  NO LA RECOMIENDO HASTA QUE NO CAMBIE LA GERENCIA Y MEJOREN EL SERVICIO.

(Translated by Google)
The worst service ACA provides. THEIR SYSTEM IS NEVER UP, THERE ARE NO MEMBER BENEFITS, THEY CHARGE YOU IN CASH, THEY NEVER HAVE A SYSTEM...THE REVENUE IS PURE MISERABLE...AND WHEN I FILL UP WITH FUEL FOR THE SAME AMOUNT AT ANOTHER IPF STATION, THE TANK IS FULL...I DON'T RECOMMEND IT UNTIL THE MANAGEMENT CHANGES AND THEY IMPROVE THE SERVICE.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3778560078587040720/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzNUwtVFNnEAE

reviews.comment:
Normalmente brinda una buena atención, pero resulta que suele quedarse sin combustible muy seguido o bien no tiene grupo generador para cuando cortan la energía eléctrica o hay algún bajón de luz, y es un "bajón" total tener que esperar hasta 2 hs y media para poder cargar combustible y poder continuar viaje

(Translated by Google)
They usually provide good service, but it turns out they often run out of fuel or don't have a generator for when the power goes out or there's a power dip, and it's a total bummer having to wait up to two and a half hours to refuel and continue your trip
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3778560078587040720/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNaHIyRGNREAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente lo recomiendo ,solo una crítica,suele pasar que cuando hay algún evento dónde salimos( receso de invierno,congreso,fin de año) todos los que tenemos vehículo del interior ( María Cristina,el chorro,lote 8) nos encontramos con que no hay combustibles

(Translated by Google)
Excellent, I recommend it. Just one criticism: it often happens that when there's an event where we go out (winter break, conference, end of the year), all of us who have vehicles from the interior (María Cristina, El Chorro, Lote 8) find that there's no fuel.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3778560078587040720/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMwN092RU13EAE
